revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:R from letter–word combination]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:R from letter–word combination]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Add |id= parameter
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from letter–word combination |name=From a letter–word combination |from=a title that is a letter–word combination |to=a topic that describes or explains the combination |all category=Redirects from letter–word combinations }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from letter–word combination |name=From a letter–word combination |from=a title that is a letter–word combination |to=a topic that describes or explains the combination |all category=Redirects from letter–word combinations }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
